global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent headline and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a sale.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: RouteBloom SALE
elements.description: Bold, uppercase text in a prominent position at the top, likely in a contrasting color to grab attention.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two abstract shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are lightly outlined and positioned in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Book your next trip
elements.description: Clear, inviting text in a larger font size, centrally placed, conveying the main message of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible booking options

elements.label: Get offer
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom with a contrasting color, inviting users to take action.
